executionArgs.additionalInstruction: forge-api must be running on port 5000. Tests target only registered routes in crates/forge-api/src/main.rs. Expect: GET /health 200; GET /api/stats and GET /api/trajectories with dir=trajectories; GET /api/issues excludes GitHub pull requests (issues-only); POST /api/run/batch malformed bodies return 400 not 422; DELETE /api/watch returns running false with repo label started_at null; trajectory list uses string exit_status (may be empty). Restart forge-api after code changes before tunnel run.
